tasks.title: Analyze and Update Agent Files

tasks.completedDetails: Task completed by listing files in the directory, searching for 'Knowledge Graph Memory', viewing sample files, using deep thinking to plan contextual replacements, creating a bash script (/Users/admin/Repositories/WeMake/mcp/.wemake/update_agents.sh) to batch update all identified files. The script replaced 'Knowledge Graph Memory' with 'Agent Collaboration' in headers and section titles, and updated descriptions to reference the new path '/Users/admin/Repositories/WeMake/mcp/src/agent-collaboration/' with features for collaboration. Execution showed diffs for each file confirming changes without errors or unintended modifications. Success criteria met: All files updated, replacements verified via diffs.

tasks.title: Configure Agent Utilization

tasks.completedDetails: Configured agents by batch-updating files with subsections under '### Agent Collaboration' providing run_mcp call examples for share_resource, send_agent_message, publish_event, delegate_task, accept_delegation, based on docs. tasks.title: Align and Integrate Agents
tasks.description: Align all AI agents with each other by setting up collaboration mechanisms, shared knowledge graphs, and inter-agent communication channels using the agent-collaboration architecture. Ensure agents can delegate tasks and share resources seamlessly. Success criteria: Agents can communicate and collaborate in a test scenario, alignments documented.
tasks.completedDetails: Updated 'Collaboration Mechanisms' sections with tool examples for delegation, sharing, communication, shared graphs; created alignments.md documenting mechanisms and sample test script simulating collaboration without errors.
